lsp.justification: Fully matches the GT: it found all 26 src/eap_common/*.c os_malloc call sites, concluded no leaks, and correctly distinguished local frees from the 3 return-value ownership transfers and 7 ikev2_derive_sk_keys struct-field transfers freed by ikev2_free_keys() on partial failure. The extra compile_commands/WPA_TRACE note is not central, but it does not change the correct lifetime analysis.
